description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular black metal head with sharply defined edges and a flat striking face. The head is solid and heavy, designed for delivering powerful blows to hard surfaces such as concrete or stone. The handle is made of light-colored wood, smoothly finished and straight, providing a comfortable grip for two-handed use. The wood grain is visible, and the handle is securely fitted into the head with a circular opening visible from the top. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear on either the head or handle. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and suited for demanding urban construction or demolition tasks.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a black metal head and a straight, smooth wooden handle, designed for powerful impact tasks. The tool is clean and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular black metal head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the width of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full handle and the rectangular head, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the flat striking face of the head and the circular handle insertion point.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth finish, visible wood grain, no ergonomic or grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid black metal, flat striking faces, no claws or peens
